primary_outcome: 12周 VISA-P 总分相对基线的变化；重返活动状态和指定负荷活动疼痛为次要结局（待临床确认）

voice_input.scope: therapist-initiated short ROM dictation only; no continuous listening or patient interview recording
voice_input.implementation: browser-native SpeechRecognition using push-to-talk; final transcript is transient and is parsed locally into reviewable ROM fields
